[![Powered by Sable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d13ac17ef50ed090e7d21fcae0caf8958eeece3d.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-FF0000?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white)](https://www.youtube.com/@Maxenonyme) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/Ucsj7fatMj)

# About Create: Deep Seas

**Create: Create Deep Seas** (also known as Create Submarine) expands on the systems of Create and the Sable physics engine to enable players to build, pilot, and survive in fully functional, physics-based submarines.

The mod is divided into **two parts**:

- Submarines, which offer a pressure system, oxygen supply, and everything else related to submarines.
- The Abyss, a future biome/dimension containing creatures and structures, providing a real purpose for building and improving submarines.


# Dependencies

*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
*   [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)
*   [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable)

\*\* Optional, but one of the three is required. 
(Only from version 2.0.0 of the mod onwards; below that version, you must have Create Addition installed.)

*   [Create Addition](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
*   [Create New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
*   [Create Power Grid](https://modrinth.com/mod/power-grid/versions)

# Mod Supported

#### -Sodium any version    
#### -[Copycat+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
#### -[Wake](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes-reforged)

# Additional Mod

#### -[Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) for connected texture
#### -[Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched) required to deepen the oceans
